changes.description: Major rewrite: added per-unit conversion (Sbase=100 MVA) for DC power flow to fix angle magnitudes; added explicit 'ALWAYS write Python script' instruction to prevent mental computation; restructured skill with CRITICAL RULES section; added clearer algorithm templates with step-by-step comments; added example output with realistic values
Minor tweaks: added float() casts for generator limits in lambda iteration to avoid int/float edge cases; increased convergence iterations to 500 and tightened tolerance to 1e-8

notes.power-flow_improvement: 85 → 100. Root cause: model was plugging MW values directly into B*theta=P without per-unit conversion, producing angles of -6 to -11 radians (test requires |theta| < 1.0). Fix: added Sbase=100 MVA per-unit conversion in skill.
notes.economic-dispatch_cap: 55 → 80 (max achievable). Root cause of initial failure: model computed dispatch values mentally without writing code, getting wildly wrong costs (~224k instead of ~1.3k). Fix: emphasized 'ALWAYS write Python script'. Remaining 20 points lost to task configuration bug: testPattern 'within limits' does not match test name 'all generators within min/max limits' (regex requires adjacent words but 'min/max' sits between them).
